page_info.description: Strategic goals and associated performance indicators for school transportation excellence.

strategic_goals.title_ar: تحقيق أعلى معايير السلامة في النقل المدرسي مع معدل حوادث صفرية بحلول 2028
strategic_goals.title_en: Achieve the highest safety standards in school transportation with zero accident rate by 2028
strategic_goals.formula_description: Weighted average of safety KPIs: Total Accident Rate (25%), Fatality Rate (25%), Driver Safety Training (25%), Safety Violation Index (25%)

indicators.formula_description: Based on Safety Dept - Total Accident Rate
Based on Safety Dept - Fatality Rate
Based on Safety Dept - Driver Compliance Rate
Based on Safety Dept - Safety Violation Index

strategic_goals.title_ar: بناء نظام حوكمة شامل يضمن الامتثال بنسبة 100% لجميع المعايير التنظيمية
strategic_goals.title_en: Build a comprehensive governance system ensuring 100% compliance with all regulatory standards
strategic_goals.formula_description: Weighted average: Audit & Governance Index (40%), Compliance Rate (30%), Vendor Performance (30%)

indicators.formula_description: Based on Governance Dept - Audit and Compliance indicators
Based on Legal Dept - Compliance tracking
Based on Operations Dept - Vendor performance metrics

strategic_goals.title_ar: تحقيق رضا متميز للعملاء بنسبة 90% أو أكثر بحلول 2028
strategic_goals.title_en: Achieve exceptional customer satisfaction of 90% or more by 2028
strategic_goals.formula_description: Weighted average: Customer Satisfaction Index (40%), Complaint Resolution (35%), On-Time Performance (25%)

indicators.formula_description: Based on Quality Dept - Customer satisfaction surveys
Based on Quality Dept - Complaint resolution tracking
Based on Operations Dept - Schedule adherence

strategic_goals.title_ar: تعزيز الكفاءة التشغيلية وتقليل التكاليف بنسبة 15% مع الحفاظ على الجودة
strategic_goals.title_en: Enhance operational efficiency and reduce costs by 15% while maintaining quality
strategic_goals.formula_description: Weighted average: Cost Efficiency (50%), Route Optimization (50%)

indicators.formula_description: Based on Finance Dept - Cost per trip analysis
Based on Operations Dept - Route optimization metrics

strategic_goals.title_ar: التحول الرقمي الشامل لجميع عمليات النقل المدرسي بحلول 2027
strategic_goals.title_en: Comprehensive digital transformation of all school transportation operations by 2027
strategic_goals.formula_description: Weighted average: Digital Adoption (60%), System Uptime (40%)

indicators.formula_description: Based on IT Dept - Digital platform usage
Based on IT Dept - System availability
